meta.title: Locado - Local Domain Manager
meta.description: Map custom domains to localhost, Docker containers, or remote hosts with built-in HTTPS support

hero.title: Local Domain Manager
typingTexts: Map custom domains to localhost, Docker, or remote hosts

items.title: Multiple TLDs
items.description: Use .local, .test, .dev or any custom TLD. Configure up to 10 different TLDs for your domains.

items.title: Built-in HTTPS
items.description: Self-signed CA with one-click trust. No external proxy like Caddy or Nginx needed.

items.title: Docker Integration
items.description: Auto-detect running containers and map them to domains. Works with container ports automatically.

items.title: Remote Hosts
items.description: Proxy to remote IPs or SSH tunnels. Access internal services through local domains.

items.title: Cross-Platform DNS
items.description: Native DNS support: dnsmasq (macOS), systemd-resolved (Linux), Acrylic (Windows), or hosts file fallback.

items.title: Full CLI & Service
items.description: Complete CLI with shell completion. Auto-start on boot via LaunchD (macOS) or systemd (Linux).

items.question: Does it require Caddy or Nginx?
items.answer: No. Locado has a built-in Go reverse proxy with SSL support. No external dependencies required.

items.question: Can I use multiple TLDs?
items.answer: Yes! You can configure up to 10 different TLDs like .local, .test, .dev, or any custom TLD you prefer.

items.question: Does it work on Windows?
items.answer: Yes. Locado supports Windows via Acrylic DNS Proxy. It also works on macOS (dnsmasq) and Linux (systemd-resolved).

items.question: How do I auto-start on boot?
items.answer: Run 'locado service enable' to configure auto-start. Uses LaunchD on macOS and systemd on Linux.

items.question: How do I completely uninstall?
items.answer: Run 'locado uninstall --purge' to remove all files, configurations, DNS settings, and certificates.

items.question: Is HTTPS really automatic?
items.answer: Yes. Locado generates a self-signed CA and certificates automatically. Run 'locado cert trust' to add the CA to your system keychain.

items.question: Binary killed immediately after install (macOS)?
items.answer: This is caused by macOS Gatekeeper quarantine. Run: sudo xattr -cr /usr/local/bin/locado

items.question: DNS setup from dashboard doesn't work?
items.answer: DNS operations require root privileges. Run the install script in terminal: curl -fsSL https://locado.hxd.app/install.sh | bash
